top_findings.summary: The skill requires an OPENAI_API_KEY environment variable, indicating it sends project data (package.json, config files, project structure) to a third-party AI service (OpenAI) for processing. While this is necessary for AI-powered analysis, the skill description does not explicitly disclose this data transmission or explain what specific data is shared. For a tool that claims "Zero config. Just works," this external data processing creates privacy risks without clear user awareness or consent regarding what project information leaves their local environment.
